title: Downloading conversations from tasks into pdf
excerpt: My team would like to be able to download approvals that are created in the updates into a pdf to submit as part of our AP workflow. Right now there is only the ability to download to excel - am I missing something that …

posts.author: sstaton (Sheryl)
posts.cookedHtml: My team would like to be able to download approvals that are created in the updates into a pdf to submit as part of our AP workflow. Right now there is only the ability to download to excel - am I missing something that allows us to download to other file types?
